name: socket
description: TCP and UDP socket primitives for low-level network programming. Based on iospharo SocketPlugin.
author: Phograph Team

primitives.name: tcp-connect
primitives.description: Open a TCP connection. Inputs: host, port. Output: socket handle.

primitives.name: tcp-listen
primitives.description: Listen for TCP connections on a port. Input: port. Output: server socket handle.

primitives.name: tcp-accept
primitives.description: Accept an incoming TCP connection. Input: server socket. Output: client socket handle.

primitives.name: tcp-send
primitives.description: Send data over a TCP socket. Inputs: socket, data string. Output: bytes sent.

primitives.name: tcp-recv
primitives.description: Receive data from a TCP socket. Inputs: socket, max bytes. Output: data string.

primitives.name: tcp-close
primitives.description: Close a TCP socket. Input: socket. Output: boolean success.

primitives.name: socket-status
primitives.description: Get socket connection status. Input: socket. Output: status string (unconnected, waiting, connected, closed).

primitives.name: udp-create
primitives.description: Create a UDP socket bound to a port. Input: port (0 for any). Output: socket handle.

primitives.name: udp-send
primitives.description: Send a UDP datagram. Inputs: socket, host, data string. Output: bytes sent.

primitives.name: udp-recv
primitives.description: Receive a UDP datagram. Inputs: socket, max bytes. Output: data string.

primitives.name: dns-lookup
primitives.description: Resolve a hostname to an IP address string. Input: hostname. Output: IP address.

primitives.name: dns-reverse
primitives.description: Reverse DNS lookup. Input: IP address. Output: hostname.

primitives.name: local-address
primitives.description: Get the local machine's IP address. Output: IP address string.
